title: Finding the no and turning it into a yes
subtitle: A visualisation for locating resistance in the body and watching it shift.
excerpt: A short visualisation practice for Day 20 of the MONEY program. Use to work with hidden resistance to wealth by giving it a location in the body and watching what happens when you stay with it.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education as a companion visualisation for Day 20 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The body-based locating technique draws on standard somatic awareness practice.

content.text: A five-minute visualisation for Day 20 of the MONEY program. The practice asks you to find the "no" to wealth (the resistance) as a sensation in the body, give it a shape and a location, and stay with it long enough to watch it soften or shift.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or soften your gaze. Three slow breaths.
Bring to mind a specific sum of money, the figure that feels like "a lot." Not the number you'd be comfortable with. The bigger number. The one that makes something in you pull back.

Stay with that number. Let it sit in front of you, in your mind's eye. Now scan your body for where the resistance is. It might be a tightening in the chest, a holding at the stomach, a tension across the shoulders. Find it. Give it a location.
Now look at the place in your body where the no is sitting. If it had a shape, what would it be? If it had a colour? Don't force the image. Let whatever comes, come.
Breathe toward it. Don't try to change it. Just let your breath move in that direction. Stay with the sensation for two or three breaths.
Now bring the number back. The same figure. And ask the sensation: what are you protecting me from? Don't reach for the answer. Let it arrive, or not arrive.
Open your eyes when ready. If a word or image came up, write it down.
